title: Obsidian Shard
description: This mod adds a obsidian shard from Minetest. Obsidian shard looks similar to MESE shards. You can craft a obsidian shard from one obsidian block. If you have 9 obsidian shards, you can craft a Obsidian block
body:
This mod adds a obsidian shard from Minetest. Obsidian shard looks similar to MESE shards. You can craft a obsidian shard from one obsidian block. If you have 9 obsidian shards, you can craft a Obsidian block

Link to minetest: https://www.minetest.net/
